title: Compat Artifacts
description: Adds compatibility between popular mods and Artifacts.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/Oh2noKO.png) 📖 About Artifacts Compat lets you get 16 Artifacts addon integrations in one mod. Instead of installing many separate addons, you just install Artifacts Compat, and it automatically adds content for any supported mods you already have. The mod adds 100+ artifacts, each with its own unique effect, clearly explained in the tooltip. Some artifacts work in unusual ways, but that’s what makes them fun and interesting to use. *** 📃 Features * Unique artifacts: Artifacts with different effects and mechanics. * Mod-themed content: Most artifacts are designed around the mechanics of their respective mods. * Balanced gameplay: All artifacts are tested and balanced for normal survival and modpacks. * Improved visuals: Updated textures with added 3D details. *** ### 📝 Description How it works: You install Artifacts Compat. That’s it. * If a supported mod is installed, its artifacts automatically appear in the game * If a mod is missing, its artifacts simply won’t load You can also disable specific integrations in the config file: ` compatapi-compatartifacts.toml ` *** 👜 How to get artifacts Most artifacts drop from Mimics. Artifacts that don’t drop from Mimics can be found: * in mod-specific dungeons * from bosses *** **List of Supported Mod** Artifacts Compat adds integrations for: * Alex’s Caves * Ars Nouveau * Botania * Cataclysm * Create * Ecologics * Farmer’s Delight * Ice and Fire * Immersive Engineering * Iron’s Spells n’ Spellbooks * Mowzie’s Mobs * Quark * Tinkers’ Construct * Tough As Nails * Twilight Forest * The Undergarden *** 🎁 Bonus Info If you install all supported mods, you’ll get 100+ artifacts, and almost every mod adds 5 or more artifacts. *** ### 🧾 Credits Some original addons were released under the **MIT License**, which allows their content to be used. All required permissions from the original creators have been obtained. This mod is released under a **Custom License** due to major code rewrites and texture reworks. ***

Feedback is welcome!
